UART Status Register

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:2] - - - -
[1] RXNE r 0x0 Read data register not empty
[0] TXE r 0x0 Transmit data register empty

Field Descriptions

RXNE - Read data register not empty

Set by hw when rx_fifo is not empty. UART_RX can be read

TXE - Transmit data register empty

Set by hw when tx_fifo is empty. UART_TX can be written
